column1: NEW | Flood watches have been issued through Mon evening for coastal counties for rainfall amounts of 5-10" with some isolated amounts of 15"+ possible. The heaviest rains will fall Sun to Mon and amounts will vary based on where heaviest rain bands set up. If you live in an area that is prone to flooding from heavy rain, now is the time to make sure drains around your property are clear.
Pinellas’ drought conditions will soak-up a contribution to the water table.
